description_long: This is a compact, two-seater couch with a boxy, modern silhouette and straight, clean lines. The upholstery is a textured gray fabric with a subtle woven pattern, giving it a slightly mottled appearance. The armrests are thick, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, providing a sense of enclosure and support. The seat and back cushions are divided into two sections each, appearing integrated and firmly attached to the frame. The legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden base design. This couch would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or public parks.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater couch with textured gray upholstery and thick, straight armrests. The seat and back cushions are divided and integrated, with no visible legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the two divided seat and back cushions, as well as the symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the continuous, flat back panel and the absence of visible legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two seat cushions and two back cushions, both divided and integrated into the frame, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured gray fabric with a subtle, mottled woven pattern; no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base with a low profile.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are straight, thick, and at the same height as the backrest, forming a boxy enclosure.
attribute_backrest_type: High, divided backrest with two integrated sections, matching the seat cushions and providing firm support.
